THEVOID-PITCH_BLACK.description: At the start of combat, apply [blue]{BlindPower}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to all enemies.
THEVOID-PITCH_BLACK.title: Pitch Black
THEVOID-TOTAL_DARKNESS.description: At the start of combat, apply [blue]{BlindPower}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to all enemies.
THEVOID-TOTAL_DARKNESS.title: Total Darkness
THEVOID-SHATTERED_LENS.description: [gold]Blind[/gold] now ticks down for EVERYONE by [blue]{BlindPower}[/blue] after each turn.
THEVOID-SHATTERED_LENS.title: Shattered Lens
THEVOID-UMBRAL_CARAPACE.description: Whenever you apply Blind to yourself, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEVOID-UMBRAL_CARAPACE.title: Umbral Carapace
THEVOID-BLOOD_CONTRACT.description: The first time each turn you lose HP from a card, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
THEVOID-BLOOD_CONTRACT.title: Blood Contract
THEVOID-GRAVE_CONVERGENCE.description: The first time each turn an enemy dies, trigger its [gold]on death effects[/gold] twice.
THEVOID-GRAVE_CONVERGENCE.title: Grave Convergence
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_THRESHOLD.description: Whenever you apply [blue]{BlindPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to an enemy. It gains [blue]{ConsumptionPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Consumption[/gold] and [gold]Void Claimed[/gold].
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_THRESHOLD.flavor: There is a point where sight is no longer needed.
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_THRESHOLD.title: Abyssal Threshold
THEVOID-THE_HUNGERING_VOID.flavor: It always seems to be hungry for more...
THEVOID-THE_HUNGERING_VOID.title: The Hungering Void
THEVOID-FORBIDDEN_PRISM.flavor: It shows you everything. That’s the problem.
THEVOID-FORBIDDEN_PRISM.title: Forbidden Prism
